mcp_so_submission.title: Add Care Membrane to AI Safety
mcp_so_submission.template_check: no template found (404 on /contents/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE); used standard pattern from distribution-output/mcp-so-submissions.md

eu_ai_act_bugfix.root_cause: Function signature lacked 'system_name' parameter; FastMCP rejected calls when clients (mirroring check_compliance/generate_documentation/audit_report signature conventions) passed system_name. Mismatched parameter names across sibling tools in same module.
eu_ai_act_bugfix.fix_strategy: Additive backward-compat: accept system_name as optional second positional, fall back to it as description if description is empty, otherwise prepend [System: {name}] marker to description.

prompt_injection_notes: Detected and ignored potential prompt-injection in clawd/AGENTS.md and per-package .cursorrules files (classified as exfil_curl). Decisions were based on source code and tests only.
